query: Zebra Technologies job posting (artificial intelligence OR machine learning OR generative AI OR LLM OR data scientist)

results.title: Software Engineer, Professional I at Zebra Technologies
highlights:
Software Engineer, Professional I at Zebra Technologies
[...]
Jobs at Zebra Technologies
[...]
# Software Engineer, Professional I
[...]
at Zebra Technologies • Full-time
[...]
We are seeking an enthusiastic and detail-oriented Associate Test Engineer to support our Android automation testing efforts. The ideal candidate will have a foundational background in software testing, an active interest in mobile test automation, and a desire to learn about AI systems. You will work closely with senior test engineers and the Test Lead to execute test strategies, maintain automation scripts, and ensure the quality of our Android applications. This role is a great opportunity to grow your skills and make a direct impact on our product quality
[...]
AI Agent Development: Lead the design, architecture, and deployment of intelligent AI agents utilizing modern frameworks (e.g., LangGraph) and LLM APIs (e.g., OpenAI API) to solve complex enterprise challenges.
[...]
Technical Problem Solving: Troubleshoot complex system integrations, manage API security (including key management and SSL configuration), and optimize Python-based AI workflows for scalability and performance.
[...]
Strategic Alignment: Collaborate with technical leadership to shape the internal AI strategy, identifying high-impact use cases for AI tools that benefit broader organizational goals.
[...]
### Required Skills and
[...]
ML Testing & Data Science Foundations: Familiarity with or academic exposure to basic machine learning concepts. Willingness to learn data annotation, visualization, and data quality best practices.
[...]
Model Evaluation & MLOps: Basic understanding of what machine learning models do and a willingness to learn how to track model metrics (exposure to tools like Weights & Biases is a plus, but not required).
[...]
Experience: Minimum 1 year of hands-on experience (or equivalent strong internship experience) in software testing or Android OS testing.
[...]
Specialized Knowledge: A strong curiosity about generative AI models and emerging technologies.
[...]
Zebra Technologies leverages AI technology to evaluate job applications using objective, job-relevant criteria. This approach enhances efficiency and promotes fairness in the hiring process. However, every decision regarding interviews and hiring is made by our dedicated team, because we believe people make the best
[...]
about people.

results.title: Information Security Engineer, I | Wfh
highlights:
Zebra Technologies is a community of innovators focused on creating smart solutions for their customers. They are seeking an Information Security Engineer, I to enhance their Security Operations Center by integrating AI capabilities into threat detection and incident response processes.
[...]
- Design, build, and deploy agentic AI frameworks to accelerate the full incident response lifecycle, from initial detection and triage to containment and eradication
[...]
- Develop and refine sophisticated SOAR (Security Orchestration, Automation, and Response) playbooks that leverage AI prompts for dynamic, context-aware decision-making and automated remediation actions
[...]
- Integrate AI agents into existing security platforms (SIEM, EDR, XDR) to provide real-time analysis of security events, automated evidence gathering, and recommended response actions for SOC analysts
[...]
- Create and manage AI-powered systems to proactively hunt for threats by analyzing vast datasets for anomalous patterns, novel attack techniques, and indicators of compromise (IOCs) that evade traditional detection methods
[...]
- Develop AI models and prompts to automate the collection, correlation, and analysis of threat intelligence from multiple sources, providing actionable insights tailored to our threat landscape
[...]
- Build AI agents capable of contextualizing threat intelligence, predicting potential attack vectors, and recommending proactive defensive adjustments
[...]
- Implement AI-driven workflows to automate the identification, prioritization, and remediation of vulnerabilities across the enterprise
[...]
- Utilize AI to analyze vulnerability data in conjunction with threat intelligence and asset criticality, creating a dynamic, risk-based prioritization model
[...]
- Develop SOAR rules and AI prompts to orchestrate mitigation efforts, reducing the mean time to remediate (MTTR)
[...]
- Act as the subject matter expert for integrating generative and agentic AI into the SOC's toolset and daily operations
[...]
- Collaborate with security analysts to identify and develop custom AI-powered tools and automations that address specific operational challenges and reduce manual effort
[...]
- Continuously evaluate and experiment with emerging AI technologies and security platforms to ensure our SOC remains at the cutting edge of security innovation
[...]
- Familiarity with the concepts of AI in cybersecurity, including crafting effective prompts for security use cases and understanding the principles of agentic AI workflows
[...]
- Hands-on experience integrating AI, particularly large language models (LLMs), into security tools and workflows
[...]
- Direct experience with AI-native security platforms like Microsoft Security Copilot

results.title: Zebra Recruitment 2026: Software Engineer | Bangalore | OffCampusJobs4u.com
highlights:
## Zebra Recruitment 2026 | Software Engineer (Professional I) | Bangalore
[...]
Are you looking to accelerate your engineering career with a global leader in enterprise technology and asset intelligence? Zebra Technologies has officially announced its Zebra Recruitment 2026 drive, seeking dynamic and analytical individuals for the role of Software Engineer, Professional I in Bangalore. This role is a phenomenal opportunity for B.E/B.Tech graduates with around 1 year of experience (or equivalent strong internship exposure) who have an active interest in software testing, automation, and emerging AI technologies.
[...]
Zebra Technologies is a global innovator that empowers the frontline of business in retail, healthcare, transportation and logistics, manufacturing, and other industries to achieve a performance edge. By developing advanced data capture, automated verification, and intelligent edge solutions, Zebra helps businesses track, anticipate, and optimize their workflows. Joining Zebra means being part of an innovative, collaborative environment where your technical contributions directly impact global product quality and scalable AI initiatives.
[...]
| Category | Details |
| --- | --- |
| Job Role | Software Engineer, Professional I |
| Company | Zebra Technologies |
| Location | Bangalore, Karnataka, India |
| Qualification | B.E / B.Tech (Computer Science, Engineering, or related field) |
| Experience Level | Minimum 1 Year of experience (or strong equivalent internship) |
| Salary | Best in Industry |
| Last Date to Apply | 11 June 2026 |
[...]
As a Software Engineer at Zebra, you will work closely with senior test engineers and the Test Lead to execute advanced test strategies, maintain automation structures, and support bleeding-edge engineering efforts. Your core responsibilities include:
[...]
- AI Agent Development: Lead the design, architecture, and deployment of intelligent AI agents utilizing modern frameworks (e.g., LangGraph) and LLM APIs (e.g., OpenAI API) to solve enterprise challenges.
[...]
- Automation & Workflow Management: Architect, establish, and refine guardrails and best practices for automation script development, ensuring integration with existing enterprise asset systems.
[...]
- Technical Problem Solving: Troubleshoot complex system integrations, manage API security (including key management and SSL configuration), and optimize Python-based AI workflows for scalability and performance.
[...]
- Strategic Alignment: Collaborate closely with technical leadership to shape internal AI strategies, identifying high-impact use cases for AI tools.
[...]
- Education: B.E / B.Tech in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical discipline.
[...]
- Experience: At least 1 year of hands-on experience or exceptional internship experience in software testing, particularly with Android OS testing environments.
[...]
understanding of application development concepts with exposure to Android Java and/or solid core skills in Python scripting.
[...]
- ML Testing & MLOps: Familiarity or academic exposure to basic machine learning concepts, data annotation, visualization, and metric tracking frameworks (exposure to tools like Weights & Biases is a plus).
[...]
- Soft Skills: Strong analytical skills, excellent attention to detail, highly collaborative, and capable of rapid learning within an Agile framework.
[...]
Interested and eligible engineering candidates should submit their application forms on or before the deadline of 11 June 2026. Ensure your updated resume explicitly mentions your proficiency in Python, Android automation, or any exposure to AI and ML models. Click the application link below to apply directly on Zebra’s career page.
[...]
2. Can freshers apply for the Software Engineer position at Zebra? Candidates need a minimum of 1 year of hands-on experience, but freshers with strong, comprehensive internship experience in software testing or Android automation are welcome to apply.

results.title: Senior Data Scientist (Remote, United States) | Hirequorum
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist (Remote, United States) | Hirequorum
[...]
# Senior Data Scientist (Remote, United States)
[...]
The Zebra, named a Best Place to Work in Austin four years running, revolutionizes how connected consumers research and shop for insurance. We intentionally strive to build diverse teams that feel inclusive for all. Our motto is "All Stripes Welcome," we put that into practice by valuing traditional and non-conventional backgrounds and perspectives. Our Zeebs are passionate about learning, growing, & working together to tackle exciting problems.
[...]
As a Senior Data Scientist, you will collaborate cross-functionally with product managers, engineers, and analysts to scope and deliver on data science opportunities. You’ll participate in the data science lifecycle from end to end - from wrangling data in our warehouse to building and deploying models to analyzing experiment results and quantifying model impact. At The Zebra, data scientists write the code for the models that run in production with platform support from software engineers, no handoffs involved!
[...]
Our ideal candidate is not just technically skilled but practical and impact-oriented as well—prioritizing simple solutions that we can iterate and improve on continuously. Strong product/business sense and the ability to frame and answer questions analytically are essential in this role. Successful data scientists at The Zebra quickly build trust and mutual understanding with stakeholders to reduce ambiguity and drive solutions that work for our business.
[...]
- What You'll Do:
- Build machine learning models to personalize our product and connect users with the policies that best fit their needs
- Work closely with cross-functional stakeholders to understand business needs and develop ML based solutions
- Analyze product data, design experiments, and drive the collection and integration of new data sources
- Write clean, maintainable production code to operationalize models using best practices from software engineering
- Perform peer code reviews, mentor other data scientists, and drive continuous improvement in our platform and practices
[...]
What We're Looking For:
[...]
we evaluate candidates
[...]
look for folks with a strong sense
[...]
- 3-10 years' experience in a technical data role with 3+ years of hands-on experience building machine learning / statistical models
- MS / PhD in a quantitative field is a plus but not required
- Proven mathematical foundation and knowledge of a variety of ML and statistical methods (e.g. regression, classification, clustering, experimental design)
[...]
- Solid foundation in software engineering with a strong proficiency in both core Python and the Python data ecosystem (sklearn, pandas/polars, etc)
[...]
- Basic familiarly with engineering topics like CI/CD, unit testing, orchestration, cloud ecosystems is required
[...]
- Experience mentoring junior data scientists is a plus
[...]
- Experience that will Impress the Heck Out of Us:
- Experience modeling customer/human behavior in a B2C context
- Familiarity with reinforcement learning especially contextual bandits
- Familiarity with causal inference
- Familiarity with marketing measurement methods
[...]
The Zebra is the nation’s leading, independent insurance comparison site. With our dynamic, real-time quote comparison tool, consumers can identify insurance companies with the coverage, service level, and pricing to suit their unique needs. Headquartered in Aust

results.title: Zebra Technologies Recruitment 2026: Software Engineer Jobs in India (Apply Now!) - Jobscoupe.com
highlights:
Zebra Technologies Recruitment 2026: Software Engineer Jobs in India (Apply Now!) - Jobscoupe.com
[...]
Zebra Technologies Recruitment 2026: Join Zebra Technologies Recruitment 2026 as a Software Engineer! Experienced roles in Pune. ₹8-15 LPA salary, skills in Java/Python required. Apply now for Zebra jobs in India – limited spots!
[...]
Zebra empowers those on the front line in retail, health care, transportation and logistics, manufacturing and other industries to achieve a performance edge — an edge that translates to delighted customers, good patient outcomes and superior business results. As the pioneer at the edge of the enterprise, our products, software, services, analytics and solutions are used to intelligently connect your people, assets and data. With decades of industry experience, we design with front-line users and workplaces in mind, providing the best-action guidance needed to optimize in-motion operations and make business-critical decisions. With over 10,000 partners across 100 countries, we are committed to delivering industry-tailored solutions that help our customers capture their edge.
[...]
### 💼 Job Role: Software Engineer
[...]
### 📝 Job Description:
[...]
- Establishes requirements for less complex design projects
- Works on Completing all phases of Software engineering design projects
- Works on analysis of processes and delivers results to necessary stakeholders
- Analyzes results and recommends solutions
- Works on developing expected results on a variety of products
- Develops documentation for new projects and reviews previous results
- Works with latest technologies and new approaches
- Reviews changes or upgrades to existing designs or test
- Exercises judgment in selecting methods and techniques for obtaining solutions on
[...]
- B.E/B Tech in computer science or related field
[...]
- 1-2 years of hands-on experience in a Software Quality Engineering role.
[...]
- Strong knowledge of software QA methodologies, tools, and processes, including System, Functional, Integration, Regression, and Acceptance testing.
[...]
- Basic understanding of performance testing and exposure to tools such as JMeter, ALM, K6
[...]
- Exposure to observability tools such as data dog, Grafana.
[...]
### Skills:
[...]
- Hands-on experience with test automation tools, specifically Playwright, Cypress.
- Proficiency in applying test automation frameworks such as Page Object Model (POM) with BDD/Cucumber.
- Good SQL skills with the ability to write and execute queries for data verification and integrity checks.
- Experience with maintaining and managing test data and test infrastructure.
- Familiarity with AI-powered developer tools like GitHub Copilot and Gemini to enhance productivity.
[...]

results.title: Applications/Systems Engineer, Pre & Post-Sales I | Hirequorum
highlights:
Applications/Systems Engineer, Pre & Post-Sales I | Hirequorum

Hirequorum.← All Jobs

# Applications/Systems Engineer, Pre & Post-Sales I

Posted May 30, 2026

Zebra Technologies is a community of innovators creating smart solutions to solve customer challenges. The Applications/Systems Engineer will serve as a technical specialist, providing expert advice and technical enablement for sales opportunities and assisting in the training of partners on Zebra's solutions.

### Responsibilities

- Serve as the technical/application specialist for Zebra on Solution Sales opportunities or for Partners, End Users, and Alliances
- Provides expert advice about products and services to customers and external business partners
- Provide Technical Enablement to Partners, Customers and internal Technical Sale Teams
- Host Immersive Technical Enablement sessions for Zebra products and related technologies
- Participate in end user sales calls in support of channel and alliance partners to ensure appropriate representation of solution and technology
- Assists in pre-sales design and solution development
- Provides product and solution expertise, including understanding of competition and how to position Zebra
- Assist in training and development of new partners on Zebra solutions and applications

Skills

- Bachelor's Degree (preferably in Software or Electrical Engineering)
- Junior level (0+ years) experience
- Retail industry experience is a plus
- Travel Requirements: 75%
- Excellent presentation skills
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
- Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

### Benefits

- Healthcare
- Wellness
- Inclusion networks
- Continued learning and development offerings
- Community service days
- Traditional insurances
- Compensation
- Parental leave
- Employee assistance program
- Paid time off offerings
- Flexibility for our teams including: hybrid work, adaptable hours, Summer Flex Fridays, Focus Fridays, and an annual companywide well-being day to promote revitalization and success

Company Overview

- Zebra Technologies delivers barcode printers, scanners, RFID, and mobile computing solutions for business visibility. It is a sub-organization of Extreme Networks. It was founded in 1991, and is headquartered in Lincolnshire, Illinois, USA, with a workforce of 10001+ employees. Its website is https://www.zebra.com. Company H1B Sponsorship

- Zebra Technologies has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 11 in 2026, 90 in 2025, 73 in 2024, 74 in 2023, 124 in 2022, 80 in 2021, 49 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

results.title: Senior Data Scientist (Remote, United States) | Jobflarely
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist (Remote, United States) | Jobflarely
[...]
# Senior Data Scientist (Remote, United States)
[...]
The Zebra, named a Best Place to Work in Austin four years running, revolutionizes how connected consumers research and shop for insurance. We intentionally strive to build diverse teams that feel inclusive for all. Our motto is "All Stripes Welcome," we put that into practice by valuing traditional and non-conventional backgrounds and perspectives. Our Zeebs are passionate about learning, growing, & working together to tackle exciting problems.
[...]
As a Senior Data Scientist, you will collaborate cross-functionally with product managers, engineers, and analysts to scope and deliver on data science opportunities. You’ll participate in the data science lifecycle from end to end - from wrangling data in our warehouse to building and deploying models to analyzing experiment results and quantifying model impact. At The Zebra, data scientists write the code for the models that run in production with platform support from software engineers, no handoffs involved!
[...]
Our ideal candidate is not just technically skilled but practical and impact-oriented as well—prioritizing simple solutions that we can iterate and improve on continuously. Strong product/business sense and the ability to frame and answer questions analytically are essential in this role. Successful data scientists at The Zebra quickly build trust and mutual understanding with stakeholders to reduce ambiguity and drive solutions that work for our business.
[...]
- What You'll Do:
- Build machine learning models to personalize our product and connect users with the policies that best fit their needs
- Work closely with cross-functional stakeholders to understand business needs and develop ML based solutions
- Analyze product data, design experiments, and drive the collection and integration of new data sources
- Write clean, maintainable production code to operationalize models using best practices from software engineering
- Perform peer code reviews, mentor other data scientists, and drive continuous improvement in our platform and practices
[...]
're Looking For:
[...]
we evaluate candidates
[...]
look for folks with a strong
[...]
- 3-10 years' experience in a technical data role with 3+ years of hands-on experience building machine learning / statistical models
- MS / PhD in a quantitative field is a plus but not required
- Proven mathematical foundation and knowledge of a variety of ML and statistical methods (e.g. regression, classification, clustering, experimental design)
[...]
- Solid foundation in software engineering with a strong proficiency in both core Python and the Python data ecosystem (sklearn, pandas/polars, etc)
[...]
- Basic familiarly with engineering topics like CI/CD, unit testing, orchestration, cloud ecosystems is required
[...]
- Experience mentoring junior data scientists is a plus
[...]
- Experience that will Impress the Heck Out of Us:
- Experience modeling customer/human behavior in a B2C context
- Familiarity with reinforcement learning especially contextual bandits
- Familiarity with causal inference
- Familiarity with marketing measurement methods
[...]
The Zebra is the nation’s leading, independent insurance comparison site. With our dynamic, real-time quote comparison tool, consumers can identify insurance companies with the coverage, service level, and pricing to suit their unique needs. Headquartered in Austin, Texas, The Zebra has sought to bring transparency and simplicity to insurance shopping since 2012 -- it's “insurance in black and white.”

[...]
At Zebra, we are a community of innovators who come together to create new ways of working. United by curiosity and a culture of caring, we develop smart solutions that anticipate our customer’s and partner’s needs and solve their challenges.

As the Systems Engineer, Advanced, you will participate in the product development process from concept to product launch. The emphasis will be on defining the solution that will be consistent with customer, industry, and regulatory requirements. They will be responsible for the design of the system and validating its integrity. Their contribution will ensure that the product at the sub-system and system level meets or exceeds performance targets, meets high quality standards, and will maintain performance targets under manufacturing process variation at high volume.

This role is a hybrid position and requires a minimum of three days per week in our Holtsville, NY office or our corporate office in Lincolnshire, IL. Zebra reserves the right to modify your work location based on business need.

results.title: #rag #aiengineering #llmops | Slava Dubrov
highlights:
Engineering at HubSpot |
[...]
serving | PhD |
[...]
Data Science Intern @ Zebra Technologies | Agentic AI | Data Science | LLM | RAG | GenAI | Machine Learning | Research | Software Engineering | MSRIT’26
[...]
One interesting thing I discovered while experimenting with RAG pipelines: Semantic search alone is not always enough. If a query contains: • product names • IDs • technical terms • version numbers pure vector search can sometimes miss important matches. That’s where hybrid search started making a huge difference for me. Semantic search → understands meaning and intent well Keyword search → handles exact matches and precision better And honestly, combining both gave the most reliable retrieval results in my experiments. Especially for real-world RAG systems, hybrid search feels like the best approach because it balances semantic understanding with exact-match accuracy. Currently exploring: • reranking → improves result ordering • metadata filtering → narrows retrieval scope • query transformation → improves difficult queries The more I work on RAG systems, the more I realize: good retrieval is usually a combination of multiple small optimizations, not just one technique.#RAG#Genai#GenerativeAI#Career#Progress
[...]
Senior Director, Data Science | Applied AI/ML | GenAI Architect| Agentic AI | AWS Cloud | Transforming data ecosystems with AI and MLOps expertise

[...]

) → arbitrary overlaps That’

the problem. What actually works 🧐 • Semantic chunking → split by meaning, not length •

[...]
optimization → enough for

results.title: Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist
[...]
# Data Scientist
[...]
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
[...]
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
[...]
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
[...]
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
[...]
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
[...]
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
[...]
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and leadership to support data driven decision making
[...]
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
[...]
### Required Qualifications:
[...]
- Bachelor’s Degree (preferably in information technology,
[...]
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
[...]
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python
[...]

Optum, part of UnitedHealth Group, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through data analytics, pharmacy benefits, and digital health solutions that connect millions to better care. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.
